title: Chewy Cheeses
description: An addon mod for Brewin' and Chewin' that adds compatibility with other mods cheeses
body:
Chewy Cheeses makes the cheeses from other mods use the Brewin and Chewin cheese fermenting and aging process.  Each cheese gets a cheese wheel, an unripe cheese wheel, a coaster model and a cheese fluid so that the cheese is fully intergrated.  [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/hbrQ6JvZYJ) for support and updates ## Rats mod ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_15107ebe-7720-47aa-ab9c-2ee967f8b818.png)
  • Added support for cheese, blue cheese and nether cheese
  • To save confusion Cheese has been renamed to Rat Leicester Cheese. (as it is like Red Leicester but instead of being red it is ratty)
  • Added cutting recipe to cut full cheese blocks into 2 cheese wheels.
  • Added fermenting recipe, using contaminated food to tie it into the rat mod and to represent how the rats love the flavour.

Note: disable cheese fermenting in the rats mod config to disable the cheese making from their mod

  ## Jaden's Nether Expansion ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1292685/description_e16e6309-c985-41cd-b4c6-957a4a516dc5.png)
  • Added support for Glow Cheese
  • The cheese wheel gives off a light level of 15
  • The unripe cheese wheel gives off a light level of 10

  ## Dungeon's Delight ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1292685/description_a8102c70-42be-408e-a1c8-ae3b9afe9f71.png)
  • Added support for Wardenzola
  • Integrated the new cheese block into the dungeon delight tags and recipes
  • Included the monster item rareity in the new items 

## Bonus Cheeses The mod also adds new cheeses that use ingredients from other mods to expand the cheese integration even further ## Ender's Delight - Shulker Cheese ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1292685/description_a8c0fe9e-d120-40e0-8c53-c9a1d5477e42.png)

Made using ingredients from the End

## Quark / Darker Depths - Glowshroom Cheese ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1292685/description_0f3ca2db-a837-4989-9539-959858953fab.png)

Made using Glowshrooms from either Quark or Darker Depths

## Environmental - Truffle Cheese ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1292685/description_1bce0414-af24-4cc4-b3e7-a05f5e370d17.png)

Made using Truffles added by Environmental

## Vanilla - Pitcher Cheese ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1292685/description_c14131a7-8212-4c0a-b7eb-efc42059f8f5.png)

Made using the Pitcher Pods dug up from sniffers. While not a mod compat, we feel like sniffers need a bit of love and wider integration
